title: Clarification Log Entry
description: A single entry in the clarification log, tracking open questions and decisions that must be resolved before proceeding.

question.description: The open question or decision that needs resolution

raised_by.description: Person or role who raised this clarification

phase.description: Lifecycle phase in which this clarification was raised

answer.description: The answer or resolution to the question

answered_by.description: Person or role who provided the answer

impact.description: Description of impact on scope, timeline, or design if not resolved

blocker.description: Whether this clarification blocks progress on current work
